objective: Remove obsolete facade property shims and explicit property re-exports from SDHLudusaviService in service.py.
design_decisions: Retargeted tests reading watchdog state properties like _watchdog_active to use service._watchdog directly.
Removed registry state proxies and retargeted directly to service._registry in test suites.
Removed _decky_log diagnostic properties and explicit decky mock in tests.
Split re-exported types from service.py into their exact modules like persistence and types to prevent indirect usages.
results: All tests pass successfully with unused facade shims completely decoupled and clean direct sub-manager dependencies in the test suite.
